final:
module shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000; // Clear the register
    end else begin
        q <= {serial_in, q[3:1]}; // Shift right and insert serial input
    end
end

endmodule
